initialGoal: Reflect on Pane's vision, evaluate what's been achieved, identify missing functionality, and record this in punk-records
actualOutcome: Completed TodoPanel design fixes (borderless, aligned dots, todo button repositioned). Fixed critical processing state bug. Reflected on Pane's vision and identified terminal integration as the most important missing feature. Built production bundle for real-world use.

data.goal: Reflect on Pane's vision, evaluate what's been achieved, identify missing functionality, and record this in punk-records

data.description: First real-world testing session with Pane reveals both achievement of core vision and critical missing functionality
data.achieved_vision: Single-window workspace for multi-project Claude development with clean borderless UI, integrated conversations, persistent sessions, custom todo tracking
data.critical_next: Terminal integration to close the think-write-build-test loop
data.user_quote: the whole reason i built pane is... i hated the idea of other ide out there which forced you to have multi windows panel... this sucked a lot for me, i wanted a clean working space that could really allow me to focus on building

data.summary: Completed TodoPanel design fixes (borderless, aligned dots, todo button repositioned). Fixed critical processing state bug. Reflected on Pane's vision and identified terminal integration as the most important missing feature. Built production bundle for real-world use.
pendingWork: File diff visualization for Claude edits

pendingForNext: File diff visualization for Claude edits
